smartFunctionFile.description: Relative path to the file containing the onMessage function (e.g. smartFunction.ts).

input.description: Source/transport configuration describing which messages the rule receives.

transport.description: Transport type. Currently only "mqtt" is supported.

topicPattern.description: Topic filter. Supports + (single-level) and # (multi-level) wildcards. Must not contain '**'.

clientIDPattern.description: Optional device client ID filter. Supports * as a wildcard.

tags.description: List of tags for organising rules.

disabled.description: Whether the rule deploys as disabled. Default: false.
